description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa with a deep, rich burgundy color and a boxy, geometric silhouette. The sofa features straight, angular lines with slightly chamfered corners on the backrest, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The armrests are broad and flat, extending from the seat to the top of the backrest, and are integrated seamlessly into the overall form. The seat and back cushions appear to be attached and are uniform in size, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, contributing to a clean and understated look. The legs are short and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile design that keeps the sofa close to the ground. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with a matte finish that absorbs light rather than reflecting it.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa in deep burgundy with broad, integrated armrests and a smooth, matte finish. The design is minimalist, with attached cushions and a low-profile base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the straight, angular backrest with chamfered corners and no visible cushions or detailing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the sofa's overall boxy profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the two attached seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the sofa's inviting seating area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same thick armrest and geometric silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniform seat cushions and two attached, uniform back cushions, all flush with the sofa frame and without visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests integrated into the sofa's frame, extending from the seat to the top of the backrest, with a boxy, angular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs barely visible at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, recessed to create a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with chamfered upper corners, continuous and unsegmented, with attached cushions and no visible tufting or detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in burgundy with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
